title: Gurugram University Date Sheet 2026 Out

detail.title: Gurugram University Date Sheet 2026 Out
detail.short_info: Download Gurugram University Final Date Sheet for May 2026 exams covering B.Tech, B.Voc, and M.Tech even semester (regular & re-appear). Check complete schedule, exam dates, timings, and important instructions for students.

content.text: Gurugram University has officially released the Final Date Sheet for Bachelor of Technology, Bachelor of Vocation & Master of Technology Courses for Even Semester Regular & Re-appear May-2026 Examinations. The detailed timetable covers all even semester regular and re-appear examinations for B.Tech, B.Voc, and M.Tech programmes scheduled in May-June 2026. Students can now download the official PDF from the university website www.gurugramuniversity.ac.in and plan their preparation accordingly.

The examinations will be conducted in two shifts - Morning (09:00 AM to 12:00 Noon) and Evening (02:00 PM to 05:00 PM). The date sheet includes subject-wise schedule, paper IDs, programme details, and important instructions for candidates. No login or roll number is required to download the timetable.

sections.heading: Gurugram University Date Sheet 2026 PDF here

content.text: Click Here to Download Official PDF

links.text: Click Here to Download Official PDF

sections.heading: Gurugram University Date Sheet 2026 Examinations Overview

content.text: The Final Date Sheet for Bachelor of Technology, Bachelor of Vocation & Master of Technology Courses for Even Semester Regular & Re-appear May-2026 Examinations provides the complete examination schedule for even semesters. Released by Gurugram University on 07-04-2026, it covers regular and re-appear candidates across B.Tech, B.Voc, and M.Tech programmes with clear session timings and paper codes.

rows: Final Date Sheet for Bachelor of Technology, Bachelor of Vocation & Master of Technology Courses for Even Semester Regular & Re-appear May-2026 Examinations
Bachelor of Technology (B.Tech), Bachelor of Vocation (B.Voc), Master of Technology (M.Tech)
Regular & Re-appear (Intake 2019-2021 for re-appear where specified)
Morning: 09:00 AM - 12:00 Noon Evening: 02:00 PM - 05:00 PM
As per Admit Card & Building Notice

sections.heading: How to Download Final Date Sheet for B.Tech, B.Voc and M.Tech Courses for Even Semester Regular & Re-appear May-2026 Examinations

content.text: Students can download the Final Date Sheet for Bachelor of Technology, Bachelor of Vocation & Master of Technology Courses for Even Semester Regular & Re-appear May-2026 Examinations directly from the official university portal in just a few clicks. The process is simple and does not require any login credentials.

items: Visit the official Gurugram University website at www.gurugramuniversity.ac.in
On the homepage, locate the "Examinations" or "Date Sheet" section and click on it
Find the link for "Final Date Sheet for Bachelor of Technology, Bachelor of Vocation & Master of Technology Courses for Even Semester Regular & Re-appear May-2026 Examinations"
Click the link to open the PDF file in your browser
Download the file to your device by using the download option in the PDF viewer
Save and print a copy for easy reference during your exam preparation

content.text: Always cross-check the downloaded timetable with your admit card and keep a printed copy handy for quick reference during the examination period.

sections.heading: Details Mentioned in Gurugram University Date Sheet 2026

content.text: The Final Date Sheet for Bachelor of Technology, Bachelor of Vocation & Master of Technology Courses for Even Semester Regular & Re-appear May-2026 Examinations contains every important detail students need to appear for the exams. It clearly lists the schedule along with guidelines to avoid last-minute confusion.

items: Date and day of every examination
Morning or Evening session with exact timings (09:00 AM - 12:00 Noon / 02:00 PM - 05:00 PM)
Full programme name and intake year (especially for re-appear candidates 2019-2021)
Semester number (2, 4, 6, 8)
Subject name and elective details
Unique Paper ID for each subject
Centre of Examination (as mentioned on the Admit Card & Building Notice)
Important general instructions regarding question paper checking, prohibited gadgets, and answer sheets
Language options (Hindi/English) where applicable
Clear mention of no extra answer sheet being provided
